column1: Europa is larger than our own moon.
It is now certain that there is a source of heat deep inside Europa.
Scientists want to do research under Europa's surface.
A trip to Europa would cost less than other planned missions.
Scientists used to believe that light was necessary for life to exist.
Although they can't see, the gaint worms still have eyes.
There is some oxygen in Europa's atmosphere.
Scientists are building bigger telescopes to view Europa.
